title: Roasted Mediterranean Carrot Skewers
description: Fresh and crispy roasted carrot skewers with a Mediterranean twist, perfect for a date night, featuring mantecare emulsification and vegan-friendly ingredients. This dish is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped carrots to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated carrots onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast for 20 minutes.
While the carrots are roasting, prepare the manteca emulsification by whisking together manteca and 1 tablespoon of water.
After 20 minutes, brush the manteca emulsification onto the roasted carrots and continue to roast for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the roasted carrot skewers hot, with pita bread on the side if desired.
